components.value: V, S, M/DF (a dilated human eyeball)

description.value: You gain the ability to detect fear, as per sense fear, but you sense creatures within medium range. Once per round as a standard action, you can teleport to a creature suffering from a fear effect within the spellâs range if you are aware of the creature and its rough location. You can carry objects with you so long as you donât transport more than your maximum load. You arrive in a random open space within 20 feet of the creature and immediately begin sensing the location of creatures with a fear condition from your new location. Once you teleport to a new location with this spell, you can take no additional actions for the round, as if casting dimension door. You canât teleport if there are no creatures suffering from a fear effect in range.
